title: orania archboldiana
intro: Orania archboldiana, also known as the Red Mahogany, is a species of tree in the family Sapindaceae. The bark and wood of the Orania archboldiana have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the Orania archboldiana include the reduction of fever, relief from rheumatism and arthritis, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Orania archboldiana include extracts of the bark and wood, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
